honesty_label: Measured against current WC8RSSS extracted artifacts after installing WC9 prompt hard gate. This is a narrow OS-governance scorecard, not a universal world-class certification.

criteria.criterion_text: Failure records include explicit root cause/contributing cause evidence.
criteria.scoring_rationale: runtime/receipts and lesson artifacts exist, but RCA fields are not uniformly enforced across every historical receipt.

criteria.criterion_text: Failure records create preventive action artifacts or gates.
criteria.scoring_rationale: Lesson promotion queue, fixture factory, and continuation-prompt exit gate convert recurrent failures into artifacts/gates.

criteria.criterion_text: Delivery throughput is measured from artifact events.
criteria.scoring_rationale: DORA-style baseline exists, but it remains a proxy snapshot rather than a continuous longitudinal service metric.

criteria.criterion_text: Recovery/instability is measured from artifact events.
criteria.scoring_rationale: Recovery/block-rate proxy exists, but automatic ongoing collection is not yet proven across real task families.

criteria.criterion_text: Operator exits receive clear next-step prompts and the prompt is hard-gated at stage exit.
criteria.scoring_rationale: NEXT_STAGE_COPY_PROMPT exists and next_stage_copy_prompt_exit_gate_v1.py now blocks missing/stale/generic prompts.

criteria.criterion_text: Boot authority labels distinguish full authority from diagnostic/base-only bundles.
criteria.scoring_rationale: BOOTABLE_BUNDLE_LABELING_CONTRACT and short phone-safe full authority export pattern exist.

criteria.criterion_text: HTML artifacts are checked against static accessibility criteria.
criteria.scoring_rationale: Educational HTML design-system validator exists and checks static accessibility-relevant requirements.

criteria.criterion_text: Accessibility gates are reusable and required by relevant routes.
criteria.scoring_rationale: Reusable cartridge exists, but broad enforcement across all future HTML-generation paths still requires more real-task proof.

criteria.criterion_text: Educational HTML uses reusable design tokens.
criteria.scoring_rationale: Design tokens artifact exists in the educational HTML cartridge.

criteria.criterion_text: Educational HTML uses reusable student/teacher components.
criteria.scoring_rationale: Component contract and starter template exist in the educational HTML cartridge.

criteria.criterion_text: Visual claims require render/screenshot evidence tier.
criteria.scoring_rationale: Tracker/render contracts and resolver exist, but full visual diff harness is not yet proven across real products.

criteria.criterion_text: Render evidence can be classified by honesty label.
criteria.scoring_rationale: Honesty labels exist in export/verification artifacts, but not all visual outputs are forced through a render-evidence classifier.
Lesson queue and fixture factory installed; prompt failure converted into hard gate in this stage.

criteria.criterion_text: Lessons are promoted only when artifact-backed.
criteria.scoring_rationale: Stage 3 lesson promotion queue and fixtures require artifact-backed accepted lessons.

criteria.criterion_text: Sandbox tool availability is probed before failure claims.
criteria.scoring_rationale: General capability resolver framework installed and used for method selection.

criteria.criterion_text: Fallbacks are recorded in reliability ledgers.
criteria.scoring_rationale: General capability reliability ledger and method evidence artifacts exist.

top_remaining_gaps: Real-task eval harness across actual MetaBlooms outputs
Continuous DORA-style metric collection rather than proxy snapshots
Universal enforcement of accessibility/design/render gates across all relevant routes
Full visual regression harness with screenshot/diff evidence
Uniform RCA schema enforcement across all blocked/failure receipts
